keywords.name: Visible
keywords.text: [color=#FABD5D]Visible[/color]: Both players can see this card while it's in the story.

keywords.name: Revealed
keywords.text: [color=#FABD5D]Revealed[/color]: Both players can see this card until it leaves the story.

keywords.name: Fleeting
keywords.text: [color=#FABD5D]Fleeting[/color]: After resolving, this card is removed from the game.

keywords.name: Morning
keywords.text: [color=#FABD5D]Morning[/color]: At the start of each round, if this is the top card of your discard pile, trigger the following effect.

keywords.name: Sight
keywords.text: [color=#FABD5D]Sight X[/color]: The first X cards in the story are visible to you this round. Additional Sight adds to this number.

keywords.name: Inspire
keywords.text: [color=#FABD5D]Inspire X[/color]: Next round you have X extra breath.

keywords.name: Inspired
keywords.text: [color=#FABD5D]Inspired X[/color]: This round you have X extra breath.

keywords.name: Possibility
keywords.text: [color=#FABD5D]Possibility X[/color]: At the start of each round, you gain X extra breath.

keywords.name: Retain
keywords.text: [color=#FABD5D]Retain X[/color]: The next X times you play a card, keep priority.

keywords.name: Nourish
keywords.text: [color=#FABD5D]Nourish X[/color]: The next card you resolve is worth +X points.

keywords.name: Birth
keywords.text: [color=#FABD5D]Birth X[/color]: Create a Child (0:0, Fleeting) in hand if there is none. Then increase the points of each Child in hand by X.

keywords.name: Exhale
keywords.text: [color=#FABD5D]Exhale X[/color]: If you can, spend X breath to trigger the following effect.

keywords.name: Refresh
keywords.text: [color=#FABD5D]Refresh[/color]: When played, put the leftmost card in your hand on the bottom of your deck, then draw a card if you did. Your opponent doesn’t see you do this.

keywords.name: Becomes
keywords.text: [color=#FABD5D]Becomes[/color]: When you pass while this is in your hand, transform it into the listed card.

cards.name: Dove
cards.text:
Visible
Fleeting

cards.name: Fledgling
cards.text: Morning: Worth +1 permanently.

cards.name: Rooster
cards.text: Morning: Trigger the morning ability of the top card below this with morning.

cards.name: Heron
cards.text:
Visible
Set both players' points to 0.
Costs 1 more for each card in your discard pile.

cards.name: Lay Bare
cards.text:
Visible
Exhale 1: The next card in the story loses all card-text.

cards.name: Nest
cards.text: Morning: Create a Dove in the story.

cards.name: Sky Burial
cards.text:
Fleeting
Visible
When played, create a Vulture before this for your opponent.

cards.name: Starling
cards.text:
Visible
Fleeting
Worth +1 if the next card in the story has base cost 1.

cards.name: Birdsong
cards.text:
Visible
When you pass while this is in the story, create a Dove in the story.

cards.name: Vulture
cards.text:
Visible
Fleeting
When played, gain Nourish -2.

cards.name: Let Go
cards.text: Remove from the game the top four cards of your discard pile.

cards.name: Secretary Bird
cards.text:
Visible
Worth +1 for each card in your hand with base cost 0 or 1. Remove them from the game.

cards.name: Defiance
cards.text: Costs 1 less for each card your opponent can see in the story.

cards.name: Phoenix
cards.text:
Visible
Fleeting
Give your other Fleeting cards everywhere +1 point.

cards.name: Firebug
cards.text: Discard a card.

cards.name: Immolant
cards.text: When this is discarded, add it next in the story Revealed.

cards.name: Impulse
cards.text:
Fleeting
Create two Ashes in your discard pile.

cards.name: Spark
cards.text:
When played, gain 3 breath.
Discard your next card in the story.

cards.name: Dash
cards.text: Worth -1 for each card before this in the story.

cards.name: From Ashes
cards.text: When this is shuffled, set its points to 1/3 the number of cards with Fleeting shuffled or in your hand, rounded down.

cards.name: Mine
cards.text:
Inspire 1
Create an Ashes on top of your deck, your hand, and your discard pile.

cards.name: Parch
cards.text: Worth +2 for each of your cards later in the story. Discard those cards.

cards.name: Arsonist
cards.text:
Fleeting
Create three Ashes in your discard pile.

cards.name: Veteran
cards.text: Worth +3 if your discard pile has at least eight cards in it.

cards.name: Cling
cards.text: Worth +X, where X is the highest base-cost in your discard pile. Put that card on top of your deck.

cards.name: Death
cards.text: Costs 0 if you have at least twelve cards in your discard pile.

cards.name: Goliath
cards.text: Discard the next card in the story and the top 2 cards of your deck.

cards.name: Dagger
cards.text: Your opponent discards a card.

cards.name: Hungry Ghost
cards.text: Nourish -4

cards.name: Lost in Shadow
cards.text: Discard your hand unless you have a card with base-cost 6 or more later in the story.

cards.name: Nightmare
cards.text: Morning: If you have more cards in hand than your opponent, add this to the story Revealed.

cards.name: Victim
cards.text: If you lose this round, Nourish -1 your opponent for each point you lost by.

cards.name: Imprison
cards.text: At the end of this round, if your opponent has three or fewer points, they Nourish -1.

cards.name: Sickness
cards.text:
Fleeting
Give your opponent Nourish -4, create a Sickness in their hand.

cards.name: Hurricane
cards.text: Set both players' points to 0.

cards.name: Wing Clipping
cards.text: If your opponent has more points than you, they discard a card.

cards.name: Boa
cards.text: If this is nourished, your opponent discards a card and you draw a card.

cards.name: Shadow
cards.text: Costs X, where X is the number of cards in your opponent's hand.

cards.name: Vampire
cards.text:
Worth -X where X is your opponent's points.
Costs 1 less for each card in the story.

cards.name: Isolation
cards.text: Costs 0 if you won last round without playing any cards.

cards.name: Hollow
cards.text: Set your points to 0. Nourish 1 for each point you lost this way.

cards.name: Doll
cards.text:
Morning: Worth X permanently, where X is how many points you won the previous round by.
If you didn't win, X is 0.

cards.name: Rose
cards.text:
Fleeting
Nourish 2

cards.name: Yearn
cards.text: Exhale 3: Add the top card of your discard pile to the story after this if it has base cost 3 or less.

cards.name: Abundance
cards.text: If you have 7 or more points, Exhale 1: Nourish 3.

cards.name: Hold Tight
cards.text: Put the top card of your discard pile on top of your deck.

cards.name: Pet
cards.text: This permanently retains all changes to its points.

cards.name: Bounty
cards.text: Both players Nourish 2.

cards.name: Fruit
cards.text: Nourish 3

cards.name: Heart
cards.text: When a card is played while this is in the story, discard this and Nourish 3.

cards.name: Parade
cards.text: Exhale 4: Add each card with base-cost 3 or less from your hand to the story after this.

cards.name: Me and Her
cards.text: Exhale 4: Double your points.

cards.name: Sensualist
cards.text: Costs 1 less for each of the following statuses you have: Nourish, Inspired, Sight.

cards.name: Pomegranate
cards.text: Nourish 6

cards.name: Oak
cards.text: If you win this round, Nourish 1 for each point you won by.

cards.name: Nascence
cards.text: Birth 1

cards.name: Beginner's Mind
cards.text: When this is shuffled, move it to the top of your deck.

cards.name: Just Like Dad
cards.text: Exhale 2: Create a copy in hand of the last card in the story.

cards.name: Pregnant
cards.text: Create a Child on top of your deck.

cards.name: Rebirth
cards.text:
Fleeting
Transform each of your cards later in the story into a 0:X Child, where X is its cost.

cards.name: Birth
cards.text: Birth 2

cards.name: Hug
cards.text: Worth +1 if the next card in the story is yours.

cards.name: Ancestry
cards.text: Birth 1 for each card later in the story.

cards.name: Cradle
cards.text: Birth 2

cards.name: Pass On
cards.text:
Fleeting
Create an Heirloom in hand.

cards.name: Posterity
cards.text: Morning: Birth 1

cards.name: Storytime
cards.text: Create a copy in hand of each card later in the 	story with base-cost 0.

cards.name: Uprising
cards.text: Worth +1 for each card before this in the story.

cards.name: The Future
cards.text:
Draw a card.
Costs X less, where X is the total point value of each Child in your hand.

cards.name: Dawn
cards.text:
When played, gain Sight 4.
Morning: Return this to hand.

cards.name: Clear View
cards.text: Create a Seen in your opponent's hand.

cards.name: Nectar
cards.text:
Nourish 1
When played, gain Sight 3.

cards.name: Prey
cards.text: Create a Predator in your opponent's hand.

cards.name: Timid
cards.text:
When played, gain Sight 4.
Exhale 1: Return your cards later in the story to your hand.

cards.name: Balance
cards.text: Worth +2 if the number of cards before this in the story is equal to the number of cards after this.

cards.name: Begging Bowl
cards.text: This consumes your opponent's Nourish.

cards.name: Riddle
cards.text:
Fleeting
When played, double this card's points.

cards.name: Awakening
cards.text: When played, gain Sight 5.

cards.name: Bull
cards.text: Costs 1 less if the last card in the story has the same base-cost as the top card of your deck.

cards.name: Conquer
cards.text: Costs 1 less for each card you can see in the story.

cards.name: Lantern
cards.text:
Fleeting
If this is the last card in the story, transform a card in hand into a copy of this with +2 point.

cards.name: Enlightenment
cards.text: Costs 0 if you can see at least three of your opponent's cards in the story.

cards.name: Fates
cards.text:
Exhale 5: Set both players' points to 0.
Exhale 2: Nourish 2
Exhale 1: Birth 1

cards.name: Hero
cards.text:
Exhale 5: Worth +2.
Exhale 3: Discard the next card in the story.
Exhale 1: Inspire 1

cards.name: Stars
cards.text: Inspire 1

cards.name: Dreamer
cards.text:
Draw a card if your hand is empty.
Exhale 1: Worth +1.

cards.name: Night Vision
cards.text:
Put the top card with base cost 2 from your deck into your hand.
When played, gain Sight 4.

cards.name: Cosmos
cards.text: Inspire 1 for this and each of your cards later in the story.

cards.name: Sunflower
cards.text: Inspire 1 for each point this is worth.

cards.name: Cloak of Stars
cards.text:
Gain 3 breath.
Morning: Inspired 1 for each breath you ended the last round with.

cards.name: Possibility
cards.text:
Fleeting
Increase your max breath by 1 permanently.

cards.name: Pride
cards.text: Morning: Exhale 1: Add this to the story Revealed. Discard a card.

cards.name: Moon
cards.text: Morning: Trigger the morning abilities of the top 2 cards below this with morning.

cards.name: Starfall
cards.text: At the start of each round, if your hand has at least 5 cards including this, discard this to Inspired 1.

cards.name: Ecology
cards.text: When played, gain 10 breath.

cards.name: Sun
cards.text:
Inspire 1
Morning: Inspired 2

cards.name: Liquidity
cards.text:
Refresh, Refresh
Exhale 1: Draw a card.

cards.name: Dew
cards.text: Morning: Create a Dew in your hand.

cards.name: Drown
cards.text: Discard the top three cards of your deck.

cards.name: Refresh
cards.text: Refresh

cards.name: Fishing Boat
cards.text: Put the top 3 cards with base cost 1 from your deck into your hand.

cards.name: Gain and Loss
cards.text: Discard your hand, draw that many cards.

cards.name: Fish
cards.text: When you draw this, increase its points by 1 permanently.

cards.name: Gentle Rain
cards.text: Nourish 1 for each card you've drawn this round.

cards.name: Mercy
cards.text: Each player draws a card.

cards.name: Overflow
cards.text:
Refresh
Worth +1 for each card in your hand.

cards.name: Dam Breaks
cards.text: Exhale 1: Discard 3 cards. Add your hand to the story after this.

cards.name: Iceberg
cards.text:
Draw two cards.
Costs 1 less for each time you’ve passed this round.

cards.name: Cloud
cards.text:
Refresh
Exhale 1: Draw a card.
Exhale 1: Draw a card.
Exhale 2: Draw a card.

cards.name: Excess
cards.text: Costs 0 if you have exactly four cards in the story.

cards.name: Paramountcy
cards.text:
Add the top three cards of your discard pile to the story after this.
(Besides Paramountcy)
